commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 2026-07-10

US equity markets dominate liquidity rankings, with NYSE and Nasdaq 100 commanding substantially tighter spreads and minimal price impact. NYSE's ILLIQ metric of 0.0013 is nearly 109 times lower than London Stock Exchange's 0.1414, reflecting superior execution efficiency. European venues show declining liquidity, with LSE notably lagging peers despite comparable roll spreads, suggesting concentrated trading fragmentation and reduced market depth in secondary European bourses.
